app.name: OpenAPI Generator
app.one_liner: A tool that generates API clients, servers, and documentation from OpenAPI specifications.

screens.name: Generator Dashboard
screens.purpose: Configure and run code generation from an OpenAPI spec.

rust_commands.name: generate_code
rust_commands.purpose: Generate client/server code from an OpenAPI spec using a specified generator.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for uint32/uint64 type mapping
week 1: Implement basic Rust axum generator
week 1: Integrate core OpenAPI parsing logic
acceptance_tests: C# GenericHost templates consistently handle nullability in OptionProperty.mustache and JsonConverter.mustache.
Generated code from untrusted specs is sandboxed or requires explicit user review.
Generated Rust axum models correctly use u32/u64 for format: uint32/uint64 instead of i32.
Java inheritance does not cause field name clashes between parent and subclass declarations.
